criteria_verification.criterion_text: `forge history` returns at most 50 entries by default (Group B
criteria_verification.evidence: run_history() with limit=None resolves the default via _resolve_default_limit(config) → QueueConfig().default_history_limit (50). Test TestDefaultLimitFiftyEntries::test_default_limit_caps_at_fifty_when_more_present seeds 60 builds and asserts len(rows) == 50.
criteria_verification.notes: run_history() with limit=None resolves the default via _resolve_default_limit(config) → QueueConfig().default_history_limit (50). Test TestDefaultLimitFiftyEntries::test_default_limit_caps_at_fifty_when_more_present seeds 60 builds and asserts len(rows) == 50.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `forge history --limit 1` returns at most 1 entry (Group B
criteria_verification.evidence: Test TestLimitFlag::test_limit_one_returns_at_most_one seeds 10 builds, calls run_history with limit=1, asserts len(rows) == 1. The limit flows through SqliteLifecyclePersistence.read_history(limit=1) which clamps via max(0, min(limit, MAX_HISTORY_LIMIT)).
criteria_verification.notes: Test TestLimitFlag::test_limit_one_returns_at_most_one seeds 10 builds, calls run_history with limit=1, asserts len(rows) == 1. The limit flows through SqliteLifecyclePersistence.read_history(limit=1) which clamps via max(0, min(limit, MAX_HISTORY_LIMIT)).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `forge history --limit 50` on 60 prior builds returns 50 (Group B)
criteria_verification.evidence: Test TestLimitFlag::test_limit_fifty_on_sixty_builds_returns_fifty seeds 60 builds, calls run_history with limit=50, asserts len(rows) == 50. SQLite ORDER BY queued_at DESC LIMIT 50 applied by read_history.
criteria_verification.notes: Test TestLimitFlag::test_limit_fifty_on_sixty_builds_returns_fifty seeds 60 builds, calls run_history with limit=50, asserts len(rows) == 50. SQLite ORDER BY queued_at DESC LIMIT 50 applied by read_history.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `forge history` on 10 prior builds returns 10 (does not pad)
criteria_verification.evidence: Test TestDefaultLimitFiftyEntries::test_default_limit_returns_actual_when_fewer_present seeds 10 builds, calls run_history with limit=None, asserts len(rows) == 10. No padding logic exists in run_history — the SQLite query simply returns whatever rows exist.
criteria_verification.notes: Test TestDefaultLimitFiftyEntries::test_default_limit_returns_actual_when_fewer_present seeds 10 builds, calls run_history with limit=None, asserts len(rows) == 10. No padding logic exists in run_history — the SQLite query simply returns whatever rows exist.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `forge history --feature FEAT-XXX` returns all builds for that
criteria_verification.evidence: Test TestFeatureFilter::test_feature_filter_returns_only_matching_builds seeds 3 FEAT-A1B2 + 2 FEAT-C3D4 builds, asserts the FEAT-A1B2 query returns exactly the three matching builds. Stage_log expansion verified by test_feature_filter_expands_stage_log_in_md (records a stage, asserts it appears in the md render). fetch_history calls read_stages(build_id) when include_stages=True (md/json formats).
criteria_verification.notes: Test TestFeatureFilter::test_feature_filter_returns_only_matching_builds seeds 3 FEAT-A1B2 + 2 FEAT-C3D4 builds, asserts the FEAT-A1B2 query returns exactly the three matching builds. Stage_log expansion verified by test_feature_filter_expands_stage_log_in_md (records a stage, asserts it appears in the md render). fetch_history calls read_stages(build_id) when include_stages=True (md/json formats).

criteria_verification.evidence: parse_since('2026-04-20') promotes bare date to '2026-04-20T00:00:00+00:00' UTC. _filter_since() retains rows where queued_at >= since. Test TestSinceFilter::test_since_filters_older_builds seeds 5 builds on 2026-04-19 + 5 on 2026-04-21, asserts --since 2026-04-20 yields exactly the 5 newer builds. Edge case test_parse_since_bare_date_yields_midnight_utc verifies the promotion.
criteria_verification.notes: parse_since('2026-04-20') promotes bare date to '2026-04-20T00:00:00+00:00' UTC. _filter_since() retains rows where queued_at >= since. Test TestSinceFilter::test_since_filters_older_builds seeds 5 builds on 2026-04-19 + 5 on 2026-04-21, asserts --since 2026-04-20 yields exactly the 5 newer builds. Edge case test_parse_since_bare_date_yields_midnight_utc verifies the promotion.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `forge history --format md` emits the markdown structure from
criteria_verification.evidence: render_markdown emits '# Forge history — <feature>' header, then '## <build_id> — <STATUS> (Xh YYm)' per build, 'Started:'/'Finished:' lines, optional 'PR:' line, and '### Stages' section with '- HH:MM:SS — <label> <STATUS> [score=…]' entries. Test TestMarkdownFormat::test_markdown_emits_header_and_per_build_section asserts startswith header, regex-counts per-build headings, and presence of 'Started:', 'Finished:', '### Stages'.
criteria_verification.notes: render_markdown emits '# Forge history — <feature>' header, then '## <build_id> — <STATUS> (Xh YYm)' per build, 'Started:'/'Finished:' lines, optional 'PR:' line, and '### Stages' section with '- HH:MM:SS — <label> <STATUS> [score=…]' entries. Test TestMarkdownFormat::test_markdown_emits_header_and_per_build_section asserts startswith header, regex-counts per-build headings, and presence of 'Started:', 'Finished:', '### Stages'.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: `forge history --format json` emits a JSON array
criteria_verification.evidence: render_json emits json.dumps(payload, indent=2) where payload is list[dict]. Test TestJsonFormat::test_json_format_emits_array seeds 3 builds, asserts json.loads(rendered) is a list of length 3 with build_id/feature_id/status/queued_at/stage_log keys. Empty case returns '[]' (test_json_format_empty_yields_empty_array).
criteria_verification.notes: render_json emits json.dumps(payload, indent=2) where payload is list[dict]. Test TestJsonFormat::test_json_format_emits_array seeds 3 builds, asserts json.loads(rendered) is a list of length 3 with build_id/feature_id/status/queued_at/stage_log keys. Empty case returns '[]' (test_json_format_empty_yields_empty_array).

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Import check**: zero NATS imports in `cli/history.py`
criteria_verification.evidence: TestImportDiscipline runs both an AST walk (catching ast.Import and ast.ImportFrom whose module starts with 'forge.adapters.nats') and a regex text scan (defence-in-depth) against the module source. Both assertions pass. Confirmed: src/forge/cli/history.py imports only click, forge.adapters.sqlite, forge.config.models, forge.lifecycle.persistence, plus stdlib.
criteria_verification.notes: TestImportDiscipline runs both an AST walk (catching ast.Import and ast.ImportFrom whose module starts with 'forge.adapters.nats') and a regex text scan (defence-in-depth) against the module source. Both assertions pass. Confirmed: src/forge/cli/history.py imports only click, forge.adapters.sqlite, forge.config.models, forge.lifecycle.persistence, plus stdlib.
